'''Sandflies''' were a [[species]] of fly found on [[Tatooine]]. [[Moisture farm]] [[WED 15 "Septoid 2" Treadwell toolkit droid|WED 15 Septoid 2 Treadwell]] [[Maintenance droid|repair droid]]s would often chase sandflies, mistaking their whine for malfunctioning [[moisture vaporator]]s.<ref name="CL" />
